stemHtml: In an inertial navigation system, to know the distance travelled:

options.a: integrating once the speed with respect to time is sufficient.
options.b: It is necessary to integrate once the speed in time, and to know the initial speed and the initial position.
options.c: It is necessary to integrate once the speed in time, and to know the initial speed only.
options.d: It is necessary to integrate once the speed in time, and to know the initial position only.
